title: Photo Feed Implementation
description: Build the home feed displaying photos from followed users in reverse chronological order. Implement efficient pagination (cursor-based preferred) for infinite scroll. Create photo card component showing image, caption, photographer info, like/comment counts, and timestamp. Feed should be empty state friendly for new users with no follows. Include pull-to-refresh on mobile. Query optimization for feed generation. Out of scope: algorithmic ranking, explore/discover feed, ads.
